name: Chest CT With Contrast
description: Chest CT with intravenous contrast for detailed evaluation of pulmonary parenchyma, mediastinum, and vasculature

findings.technique: Contrast-enhanced CT of the chest was performed from the lung apices to the adrenal glands with thin-section reconstructions.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Trachea and Main Bronchi
sections.content: The trachea is [midline / no deviation]. The main bronchi are [patent / no obstruction / no stenosis]. No endobronchial lesion.

sections.name: Pulmonary Parenchyma
sections.content: The pulmonary parenchyma demonstrates [no consolidation / no nodules / no ground-glass opacity / no interstitial thickening]. The lung windows show [clear lung fields / no abnormality].

sections.name: Pulmonary Vessels
sections.content: The pulmonary arteries are [patent / no embolism / no dilation]. The pulmonary veins are [normal / patent].

sections.name: Mediastinum
sections.content: The mediastinal lymph nodes are [not enlarged / no lymphadenopathy]. The mediastinal fat is [unremarkable / no mass]. No abnormal mediastinal enhancement.

sections.name: Heart and Pericardium
sections.content: The heart demonstrates [normal chamber size / no cardiomegaly / no pericardial effusion]. The pericardium is [intact / no thickening].

sections.name: Pleura
sections.content: The bilateral pleura demonstrate [no thickening / no effusion / no plaque]. No pleural-based masses.

sections.name: Chest Wall
sections.content: The chest wall demonstrates [no mass / no infiltration / no rib fracture]. The soft tissues are [unremarkable].

sections.name: Osseous Structures
sections.content: The thoracic vertebrae and ribs demonstrate [no fracture / no lytic or blastic lesion]. No bony abnormality.

sections.name: Upper Abdomen
sections.content: The liver, spleen, and adrenal glands are [unremarkable / no mass]. No upper abdominal abnormality.

impression:
1. Normal contrast-enhanced chest CT.
2. No pulmonary nodule, mass, or infiltrate.
3. No mediastinal lymphadenopathy or vascular abnormality.
author: RadReport Templates
